name: Angkor: Runefall
short_description: Save an magical village in this extraordinary Match-3 game! Use the ancient runes to cast magic and defeat the dark powers.
detailed_description: Save an magical village in this extraordinary Match-3 game! When the sudden catastrophe struck the hidden village of magicians, they turned to the only person in the village capable of using the ancient runes to cast magic: a bright, young, mage apprentice. Can you uncover the secret behind the catastrophe, brave the hidden dangers, save the village, and reach the happy ending?
about_the_game: Save an magical village in this extraordinary Match-3 game! When the sudden catastrophe struck the hidden village of magicians, they turned to the only person in the village capable of using the ancient runes to cast magic: a bright, young, mage apprentice. Can you uncover the secret behind the catastrophe, brave the hidden dangers, save the village, and reach the happy ending?
